mapper.select:
SELECT AVG(metric_value) AS avg_val, MAX(metric_value) AS max_val, MIN(metric_value) AS min_val, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM metric_snapshot
AND metric_name = #{metricName} AND service = #{service} AND recorded_at >= TIMESTAMPADD(MINUTE, -#{sinceMinutes}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: DELETE FROM metric_snapshot WHERE recorded_at < TIMESTAMPADD(DAY, -#{days}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
